descriptions.text: Goudall is platformer game for real Gameboy Color hardware. You can try the demo version with 3 levels. Wizard Goudall must find 3 diamonds in each level to open the door to the next level.

The evil wizard Walator has insidiously attacked the unsuspecting Goudall. He has cursed Goudall's magical power into diamonds that he hid in his underground kingdom. In order for Goudall to regain his magical power and defeat Walator, he will have to find all the diamonds. The journey will not be easy. The underground is full of Walator's evil monsters, and Goudall can only rely on his fast feet.

Help Goudall explore all 20 underground caves and collect all the diamonds. You must watch out for snakes, bats, hot lava, poisonous plants, giant monsters and many other traps in Waltor's underground world.

Goudall is a classic platformer game where your timing and balance are key. Goudall cannot attack because he has lost all his magical power. He can only run and jump. But he is not helpless if you help him.
